name: Xinjiang Qingsong Building Materials and Chemicals (Group) Co.,Ltd.
summary: Xinjiang Qingsong Building Materials and Chemicals (Group) Co., Ltd. produces and sells cement products in China. It offers Portland, ordinary Portland, pozzolanic Portland, fly ash Portland, and other cement products. The company also exports its products to Central Asian countries. Xinjiang Qingsong Building Materials and Chemicals (Group) Co., Ltd. is based in Aksu, China.
